name: Nail Salon
title: AI Tools for Nail Salons | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for nail salons — fill appointments, cut no-shows, and keep clients rebooking. Built in two weeks, starting at $1,500.
hero_lede: Nail salons run on a full appointment book and steady regulars. Missed messages, no-shows, and clients who drift away cost real money. We build the tools that keep the book full.
drains: Booking messages and DMs coming in while techs are with clients
No-shows and last-minute cancellations leaving gaps
Clients who don't rebook for their next fill or set
Open mid-week slots that never get filled

tools.title: Booking assistant
tools.body: Every call, text, and DM gets an instant reply, the service matched to the right tech, and a slot booked — so a busy salon never loses a client to a slow reply.

tools.title: No-show reducer
tools.body: Confirmations and reminders go out before every appointment, and cancellations get offered to your waitlist so gaps fill themselves.

tools.title: Rebooking assistant
tools.body: It nudges clients when they're due for their next fill or set, keeping the rebooking rhythm steady instead of leaving it to memory.

tools.title: Daily salon brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's appointments by tech, open slots to fill, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A nail salon taking bookings through DMs and texts.
cases.before: Messages waited while techs worked; some clients booked elsewhere.
cases.after: Every message answered instantly and booked with the right tech.
cases.impact: Representative result: a fuller book with less front-desk scramble.

cases.before: Clients came in once and weren't reminded for their next fill.
cases.after: Clients nudged automatically when they're due to come back.
cases.impact: Representative result: a steadier, more predictable weekly schedule.

faq.q: Can it take bookings from Instagram DMs?
faq.a: Yes. It can answer DMs, texts, and calls, match the service to the right tech, and book the slot — wherever your clients reach out.
Well-timed confirmations and reminders make a real difference, and any cancellation gets offered to your waitlist so the gap fills itself.

faq.q: Will it work with my booking software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Vagaro, GlossGenius, Square, or whatever you already use.
